creator: bryan@shatow.net
text:
On 8/7/2012 4:08 AM, ale@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> It's not a bsd.php.mk problem, it's an issue in ioncube port.
> Try adding:
> USE_SUBMAKE=yes
> in ioncube Makefile.
> 

That's a good idea. I'll keep that in mind for the future.

However, this does not work in this case as the problem is purely in
'make install' phase. Poudriere does not install RUN_DEPENDS before
'install' as the port should build fine without RUN_DEPENDS being
installed (per bapt@).


With USE_SUBMAKE:

=======================<phase: install  >==========================
===>  Installing for ioncube-4.2.2
===>   ioncube-4.2.2 depends on file: /usr/local/include/php/main/php.h
- not found
===>    Verifying install for /usr/local/include/php/main/php.h in
/usr/ports/lang/php53
===>   Installing existing package /usr/ports/packages/All/php53-5.3.15.txz
Installing php53-5.3.15...Installing libiconv-1.14... done
Installing libxml2-2.7.8_3...Installing pkgconf-0.8.5... done
 done
Installing pcre-8.31... done
 done
===>   Returning to build of ioncube-4.2.2
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if devel/ioncube already installed
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/ioncube/work/ioncube/ioncube_loader_fre_.so
/usr/local/lib/php/20090626/ioncube/ioncube_loader.so
install:
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/ioncube/work/ioncube/ioncube_loader_fre_.so: No
such file or directory
*** Error code 71

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/ioncube.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/ioncube.
===>  Cleaning for ioncube-4.2.2


Bryan
